qsforge.release_notes: Hotfix for 1.0.1: 3D preview now actually works in the installed build. 1.0.1's frozen build was missing pycollada's schema-1.4.1.xml data file (used wrong PyInstaller package name — pycollada is the PyPI name; Python imports as 'collada'). Symptom in 1.0.1: 3D Preview tab always showed 'Could not load 3D preview, 404 Not Found' on every model. 1.0.2 bundles the schema correctly. No other behaviour changes.

ddc.release_notes: DDC ships bundled inside the QSForge installer; no separate download yet.
